title: GNDU – Non Teaching – 41 Posts

basic_details.job_title: GNDU Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 41 Clerk, Security Guard and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 41 Non Teaching. Candidates with BCA, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, ITI, Member of ICAI, MPT Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through GNDU website, https://digital.gndu.ac.in/.
basic_details.organization_name: Guru Nanak Dev University (GNDU), Amritsar, Punjab
basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Taxation), Estimator, Physiotherapist, Watch & Ward Supervisor, Clerk-cum-Junior Data Entry Operator, Security Guard & others

qualification.education_qualification: BCA, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, ITI, Member of ICAI, MPT
